case_title: CODY, THOMAS A. et al vs. ROGERS, WILLIAM R. DBA ROGERS CONSTRUCTION et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CODY, THOMAS A. CODY, PAMELA L. AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, WILLIAM R. DBA ROGERS CONSTRUCTION ROGERS, VIRGINIA SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-21-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-20-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-01-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-21-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-21-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR AUG-05-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
